title: Adaptive MFA & Risk-Based Auth
description: Design context-aware authentication challenges using adaptive MFA and risk-based authentication. Implement mechanisms to trigger authentication challenges based on IP reputation, device fingerprinting, or behavioral anomalies. Analyze user behavior patterns to identify and respond to potential authentication risks.
objectives: Design context-aware authentication challenges using adaptive MFA and risk-based authentication.
Implement mechanisms to trigger authentication challenges based on IP reputation, device fingerprinting, or behavioral anomalies.
Analyze user behavior patterns to identify and respond to potential authentication risks.
